---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, command, template, or doc
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

<!--
What problem does this solve? Cite the real workflow where you
hit it. Speculative features without a documented use case are
usually rejected.
-->

## Proposed surface

<!--
If this is a CLI feature: the command, the flags, the exit codes,
the expected output.
If this is a template: the file path and the placeholders.
If this is a doc: the title, the audience, and the soft cap.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
List the other approaches you considered and why this one wins.
Doctrina rejects role-based parallel agents, runtime deps, and
auto-generated context; if your proposal touches any of those,
explain why the existing decisions do not apply.
-->

## Scope boundaries

<!--
Explicitly say what this feature does NOT cover. Doctrina prefers
small features with clear edges.
-->

## How would `doctrina validate` and `doctrina analyze` see it?

<!--
If this changes how artifacts look on disk, describe how the
existing quality gates interact with the new shape.
-->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to related issues, prior art in other frameworks, etc. -->
